name: Tuna-Tater Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix potato chips with 1/2 cup of the cheese and set aside.
2. Combine mashed potatoes, egg yolks, and mustard.
3. Stir in tuna and remaining 1/2 cup of cheese.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the potato-tuna mixture.
5. Transfer to a greased 2-quart baking dish and sprinkle evenly with the potato chip mixture.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 45 minutes.
